subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto My call from the precincts of the Prison, and be thou not of the heedless. Grievous have waxed the tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع ندائی عن شطر السجن و لاتکن من الغافلین و اشتدت علی البلایا
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
